skills.name: Android Strings Localized Translate
skills.summary: Fills missing translations for nine Android locale files while preserving existing localized values.
skills.description: Imports the full Android string translation skill package, including validation and sync scripts, so maintainers can install and use it from this monorepo.

compatibility.notes: Requires Python 3 to run the bundled sync and validation scripts.

examples.prompt: Fill missing translations in strings_localized.xml for all nine locales.
examples.outcome: Reports missing keys, writes only missing translations, and preserves line layout.

skills.name: Catalog Maintainer
skills.summary: Helps maintainers keep this skills monorepo valid, documented, and versioned.
skills.description: Use this skill to review incoming skills, validate metadata, and keep generated documentation synchronized with the repository source of truth.

compatibility.notes: Works anywhere the monorepo tooling can copy a skill directory.

examples.prompt: Review a new skill before merging it.
examples.outcome: Checks metadata, version, changelog, and generated docs expectations.
